title: Seeking Refuge in Allah's Perfect Words
arabic_text: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
transliteration: A'udhu bikalimaatillahi at-taammaati min sharri ma khalaq
english_translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He created.
english_meaning: This dua seeks protection from all forms of evil through Allah's perfect words.
benefits: Shields from harm caused by creation, jinn, and evil beings.

title: Dua for Protection from the Evil Eye
arabic_text: أُعِيذُكَ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ
transliteration: U'eedhuka bikalimaatil-laahit-taammati min kulli shaytaanin wa haammah, wa min kulli 'aynin laammah.
english_translation: I seek refuge for you in the perfect words of Allah from every devil and every poisonous reptile, and from every evil eye.
english_meaning: This dua is recited to seek Allah's protection for someone from the negative effects of the evil eye (envy and jealousy) and all forms of harm, including the influence of evil spirits and the dangers posed by venomous creatures. It emphasizes the complete and perfect protection offered by Allah's words.
benefits: Provides protection from the evil eye, harmful spirits, and other forms of negative energy and harm. It strengthens faith and reliance on Allah's protection. It can be recited for oneself or for others.

title: Asking for Knowledge, Provision, and Accepted Deeds
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman naafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan
english_translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds.
english_meaning: A supplication for knowledge that benefits, lawful sustenance, and deeds accepted by Allah.
benefits: Encourages seeking lawful provision and actions that are accepted by Allah.

title: Asking Forgiveness and Purity
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ ذَنْبِي، وَطَهِّرْ قَلْبِي، وَقِنِي شَرَّ نَفْسِي، وَحَصِّنْ فَرْجِي
transliteration: Allahummaghfir dhanbi, wa tahhir qalbi, wa qini sharri nafsi, wa hassin farji
english_translation: O Allah, forgive my sin, purify my heart, protect me from my wicked self, and safeguard my chastity.
english_meaning: A comprehensive dua asking for forgiveness, purity, self-control, and chastity.
benefits: Helps cleanse sins and promotes moral purity.

title: Asking for Help in Worship
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
transliteration: Allahumma a'inni 'ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibaadatik
english_translation: O Allah, help me to remember You, thank You, and worship You well.
english_meaning: This dua asks Allah for support in remembering Him, being grateful, and perfecting worship.
benefits: Strengthens worship and mindfulness of Allah.

title: Seeking Refuge from Affliction and Enemies
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ جَهْدِ الْبَلَاءِ، وَدَرَكِ الشَّقَاءِ، وَسُوءِ الْقَضَاءِ، وَشَمَاتَةِ الْأَعْدَاءِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min jahdil-balaa', wa darkish-shaqaa', wa soo'il-qadaa', wa shamaatatil-a'daa'
english_translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the hardship of affliction, from reaching misery, from an evil fate, and from the gloating of enemies.
english_meaning: This dua is a shield against trials, misfortune, and harm from enemies.
benefits: Protects from hardships, bad destiny, and enemies' harm.

title: Dua for Sovereignty and Dominion (Allahumma Maalikal Mulki)
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ مَالِكَ الْمُلْكِ تُؤْتِي الْمُلْكَ مَنْ تَشَاءُ وَتَنْزِعُ الْمُلْكَ مِمَّنْ تَشَاءُ وَتُعِزُّ مَنْ تَشَاءُ وَتُذِلُّ مَنْ تَشَاءُ بِيَدِكَ الْخَيْرُ إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
transliteration: Allahumma maalikal mulki tu'til mulka man tashaa'u wa tanzi'ul mulka mimman tashaa'u wa tu'izzu man tashaa'u wa tudhillu man tashaa'u biyadikal khairu innaka 'alaa kulli shay'in qadeer
english_translation: O Allah, Owner of Sovereignty, You give sovereignty to whom You will and You take sovereignty away from whom You will. You honor whom You will and You disgrace whom You will. In Your hand is [all] good. Indeed, You are over all things competent.
english_meaning: This dua is a supplication acknowledging Allah as the ultimate owner and controller of all sovereignty and dominion. It highlights His power to grant and take away power, honor, and disgrace as He wills. It emphasizes that all good lies in His hand and that He is capable of all things. This dua is a humbling reminder of Allah's absolute authority and our dependence on Him.
benefits: Reciting this dua acknowledges Allah's ultimate power and control. It promotes humility, gratitude, and reliance on Allah. It can be recited for seeking blessings, protection from harm, and for guidance in matters of power and authority.

title: Asking Allah for Paradise and Protection from Hellfire
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ، وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ عَمَلٍ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ، وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ عَمَلٍ
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka al-jannah wa maa qarraba ilayha min qawlin aw 'amal, wa a'udhu bika min an-naar wa maa qarraba ilayha min qawlin aw 'amal
english_translation: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and for whatever brings one closer to it in word or deed. And I seek refuge in You from the Fire and from whatever brings one closer to it in word or deed.
english_meaning: This dua combines the ultimate request for Paradise and protection from Hell.
benefits: Focuses the believer on actions leading to Jannah and away from Hellfire.

title: Dua of Prophet Musa (Moses) - Acknowledging Need
arabic_text: رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
transliteration: Rabbi inni limaa anzalta ilayya min khairin faqeer
english_translation: My Lord, indeed I am, for whatever good You send down to me, in need.
english_meaning: A humble admission of one's dependence on Allah's blessings.
benefits: Instills humility and reliance on Allah's provision.

title: Dua for Acknowledging Wrongdoing
arabic_text: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
transliteration: Rabbanaa zalamnaa anfusanaa wa il lam taghfir lanaa wa tarhamnaa lanakoonanna minal khaasireen.
english_translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.
english_meaning: This is a heartfelt plea to Allah acknowledging one's own wrongdoing and seeking His forgiveness and mercy. It expresses the understanding that without Allah's forgiveness and mercy, one will inevitably be among the losers in this life and the Hereafter.  It's a powerful expression of humility and dependence on Allah's grace.
benefits: Seeking forgiveness and mercy from Allah; Acknowledging one's sins; Prevents despair and fosters hope in Allah's mercy; Leads to spiritual purification; Attaining Allah's pleasure.

title: Dua for Well-being in This World and the Hereafter
arabic_text: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
transliteration: Rabbanaa aathinaa fid-dunyaa hasanatan wa fil-aakhirati hasanatan wa qinaa 'adhaaban-naar
english_translation: Our Lord, give us in this world [that which is] good and in the Hereafter [that which is] good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
english_meaning: This is a comprehensive prayer asking Allah for goodness in both worldly life and the afterlife, seeking His protection from the torment of Hellfire.
benefits: This dua is considered one of the most comprehensive and beneficial prayers.

title: Dua for Righteous Spouse and Offspring
arabic_text: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
transliteration: Rabbanaa hablanaa min azwaajinaa wa dhurriyyatinaa qurrata a'yunin waj'alnaa lil muttaqeena imaamaa
english_translation: Our Lord! Grant us from our spouses and offspring the coolness of [our] eyes and make us leaders for the righteous.
english_meaning: This dua is a supplication to Allah to grant one righteous spouses and offspring who are a source of joy and comfort.
benefits: Attaining righteous spouse and offspring, gaining contentment in family life.

title: Dua for Righteous Offspring
arabic_text: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنَ الصَّالِحِينَ
transliteration: Rabbi hab lī minaṣ-ṣāliḥīn
english_translation: My Lord, grant me [an offspring] from the righteous.
english_meaning: This is a supplication to Allah asking for righteous and pious offspring.
benefits: A powerful supplication for those desiring righteous children.

title: Dua for Divine Gift and Offspring
arabic_text: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ ذُرِّيَّةً طَيِّبَةً ۖ إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ
transliteration: Rabbi hab lī min ladunka dhurriyyatan ṭayyibatan, innaka samī'u d-du'ā.
english_translation: My Lord, grant me from Yourself a good offspring. Indeed, You are the Hearer of supplication.
english_meaning: This dua is a plea to Allah for the bestowal of righteous offspring.
benefits: Beneficial for those seeking righteous children.

title: Dua for Offspring
arabic_text: رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِي فَرْدًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الْوَارِثِينَ
transliteration: Rabbi laa tazarni fardan wa anta khairul waaritheen
english_translation: My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while You are the best of inheritors.
english_meaning: This dua is a plea to Allah to grant offspring.
benefits: Recited to ask Allah for righteous offspring.

title: Dua for Sufficiency in Halal Provision
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ أَغْنِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
transliteration: Allahumma aghninee bi halaalika 'an haraamika wa aghninee bi fadhlika 'amman siwaak.
english_translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have permitted instead of what You have forbidden, and make me independent of all others besides You with Your bounty.
english_meaning: A supplication for financial independence from lawful sources.

title: Dua for Guidance and Piety
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka al-huda wat-tuqa wal-'afafa wal-ghina
english_translation: O Allah, I ask You for guidance and piety, and chastity and self-sufficiency.
english_meaning: A supplication seeking guidance, piety, purity, and contentment.
benefits: Seeks fundamental aspects of a fulfilling Islamic life.

title: Dua for Steadfastness of the Heart
arabic_text: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ
transliteration: Rabbanaa laa tuzigh quloobanaa ba'da idh hadaytanaa wa hab lanaa min ladunka rahmah, innaka antal wahhaab.
english_translation: Our Lord, let not our hearts deviate after You have guided us and grant us from Yourself mercy. Indeed, You are the Bestower.
english_meaning: A supplication asking for steadfastness and mercy.
benefits: Protects against misguidance and strengthens faith.

title: Dua for Protection from Reprehensible Traits
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ مُنْكَرَاتِ الأَخْلاَقِ، وَالأَعْمَالِ، وَالأَهْوَاءِ
transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min munkarati al-akhlaq, wal-a'maal, wal-ahwa'
english_translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from reprehensible traits, deeds, and desires.
english_meaning: A supplication seeking protection from bad character, actions, and desires.
benefits: Cultivates good character and protects from sinful actions.

title: Dua for Forgiveness of All Sins
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ، دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ، وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ، وَعَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
transliteration: Allahumma ighfir li dhanbi kullahu, diqqahu wa jillahu, wa awwalahu wa akhirahu, wa `alaniyyatahu wa sirrahu
english_translation: O Allah, forgive all my sins, the smallest and the greatest, the past and the future, and those done openly and secretly.
english_meaning: A comprehensive supplication asking forgiveness for every type of sin.
